name: ust
description: UST (Universal State Transcript) — specification, conformance vectors, and reference implementations. Trust infrastructure for machine-readable state.

scripts.test:vectors: node packages/ust-protocol/gen-arc-vectors.mjs && git diff --exit-code vectors/arc-vectors.json && node packages/ust-protocol/run-arc-vectors.mjs
scripts.test:spec-sync: node tools/gen-spec-registry.mjs && git diff --exit-code spec/UST-1.0.md && node tools/spec-code-sync.mjs
